title: Microsoft Evaluates Closure of Xbox Studios and Top Executives Resign Amid Restructuring
summary: Reports indicate that Double Fine, Ninja Theory, and Compulsion Games seek to avoid closure, while the head of Xbox Game Studios resigns as part of a reset plan.

title: EA Launches New Advertising Platform to Integrate Ads Directly into Games
summary: Electronic Arts announces its plan to allow brands to integrate directly into gameplay, drawing criticism from players.

title: The 2026 Nintendo Direct Was the Most-Watched Event of Summer Game Fest, with Ocarina of Time Remake as Star
summary: Audience data reveals that Nintendo's presentation was the most followed, and Nintendo removes leaked information about the Zelda remake.

title: Assassin's Creed Shadows Receives Its Final Update with a New Mission and Switch 2 Improvements
summary: Ubisoft releases patch 1.1.11 adding endgame content, an additional main mission, and optimizations for Nintendo's console.

title: UK Bans Social Media and Streaming Platforms for Under-16s, Also Affecting Gaming Services
summary: The new British legislation sparks debate over its effectiveness and its impact on the video game industry and multiplayer gaming.

title: Blizzard Reveals Details of New Hero Shion for Overwatch, Inspired by Action Movies
summary: Shion arrives in Overwatch with an agile and elegant skill kit inspired by John Wick, Akira, and Kill Bill, alongside the new season.

title: Dead by Daylight Celebrates Its Tenth Anniversary with Major News and Announces a Film Adaptation
summary: Behaviour Interactive releases free Bloodpoints, a new horror icon, visual enhancements, and confirms the movie already has a director.

title: Steam Next Fest Returns with Hundreds of Demos Available for Players
summary: Valve kicks off its demo festival, offering an overwhelming number of free games to try during the event.

title: The Creators of Life is Strange, Don't Nod, Face Serious Funding Problems
summary: The French studio confesses it has no money to reach 2027 and that its future will be decided in the coming days, affecting projects like Aphelion.

title: Capcom Removes Controversial Microtransactions and Deluxe Edition from Dragon's Dogma 2
summary: The company removes the controversial microtransactions from the game ahead of its next major release, seeking to improve the title's perception.

title: Treyarch Studio Head Mark Gordon Leaves the Company After Nearly a Decade
summary: The veteran head of the Call of Duty studio steps down, marking a significant change in the franchise's development team.

title: Blizzard Sues a World of Warcraft Private Server for Massive Copyright Infringement
summary: The company sues an unofficial server that allegedly generated millions of dollars by infringing its intellectual property on a large scale.

title: Nintendo Releases System Update 22.5.0 for Switch 2 and Switch
summary: The new firmware update, now available, includes various stability improvements and new features for Nintendo's hybrid console.

title: A Surprise Marvel vs. Capcom 3 Update Breaks a Character Years After Release
summary: Ultimate Marvel vs. Capcom 3 receives its first major patch in nearly a decade on Steam, affecting game balance and breaking a top-tier fighter.

title: The Entire Final Fantasy Series Is on Sale on Steam, Including FF7 Remake and Rebirth
summary: Square Enix puts all titles of the franchise at reduced prices, offering a golden opportunity for PC players.

title: Bungie Was 'Very Close' to Shutdown Before Sony Acquisition, According to a Former Employee
summary: While Destiny 2 revives, a former employee reveals that the Marathon studio was on the brink of disappearing before being bought by Sony.

title: EA Sports FC 26 Returns to Number One in UK Sales While New Guides Are Published
summary: EA's football simulator regains the top spot in the British sales charts and the best players and rewards of its new modes are revealed.

title: House of the Dragon Season 3 Promises Redemption with the Arrival of the Battle of the Gullet
summary: Criticism of the early episodes and hype for the naval conflict define the future of the HBO series, generating divided opinions among the press.

title: HBO's Harry Potter Series Reveals Casting for a Key Character and Its Peculiar Quidditch
summary: The actor for an iconic book character is announced, and the strange new way of playing Quidditch in the TV adaptation is detailed.

title: A Very Rare Copy of Super Mario Bros. for NES Sells for $3 Million
summary: A copy considered a holy grail by collectors reaches a record price of three million dollars at auction.
